name: Kira

notes: all combat numbers are simulator output on unverified constants
checkpoint levels are provisional (no level timeline in the match feed)
evidence deltas carry finished-inventory survivorship bias
this build stacks over +100% attack speed and the sim has NO measured attack-speed cap (calibration checklist 7) — sustained-DPS numbers are optimistic until the cap is measured

coachLine: Sim-optimal for sustained DPS: first spike lands around minute 12 (Deathstalker), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +18.6% on your headline output at minute 15.

augments.name: Bringer Of Mercy
augments.note: per-hit ripple reduction of all current cooldowns; cross-ability cadence not yet modeled (mana discount not scored)

augments.name: Siphoning Purge
augments.note: heals 25% of ult damage dealt; damage-coupled healing not yet modeled

augments.name: Lenore
augments.note: targets passive Nevermore, which is outside the kit model

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 25 — about 374 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +14% more sustained auto DPS: try Deathstalker over Solaris (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 25 — about 356 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +20% more sustained auto DPS: try Deathstalker over Solaris (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 26 — about 1,525 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer agrees: within 3% of our best core on one-combo burst. The winrate is earned, not luck.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Tainted Rounds: their 3s all-in loses 39% of its bite; you give up 31% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Even kill threat throughout: this lane is decided by mechanics and wave control, not scaling.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Tainted Rounds: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 31% of your damage.
